zh.lifeSummary: Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish於大約1250年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾可萊尼尼希 卡素。他於1291年與Lady Christina MacNaughton在蘇格蘭阿吉爾可萊尼尼希 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1350年在蘇格蘭享年102歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish于大约1250年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾可萊尼尼希 卡素。他于1291年与Lady Christina MacNaughton在苏格兰阿吉爾可萊尼尼希 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1350年在苏格兰享年102岁。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Dugald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Dubhghall . The final -d is due to a mishearing of the Gaelic form, in which the final -ll sounds like -ld to English ears.

variants.name: Dubhghall
meanings: Gaelic: from dubh ‘black, dark’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was a byname applied to Danes, in contrast to the fairer Norwegians and Icelanders ( compare Fionnghall ).

en.lifeSummary: Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish was born about 1250, in Craignish Castle, Argyll, Scotland. He married Lady Christina MacNaughton in 1291, in Craignish Castle, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died about 1350, in Scotland, at the age of 102.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish est né environ 1250, à Craignish Castle, Argyll, Écosse. Il a épousé Lady Christina MacNaughton en 1291, à Craignish Castle, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1350, à Écosse, à l’âge de 102 ans.

Er hat 1291 in Craignish Castle, Argyll, Scotland Lady Christina MacNaughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1350 im Alter von 102 Jahren in Scotland.

ko.Craignish, Argyle, Scot: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 크레이그니시 카스틀

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish(은)는 대략 1250년 스컷랜드 아그이 크레이그니시 카스틀에서 태어났다. 그는 1291년 스컷랜드 아그이 크레이그니시 카스틀에서 Lady Christina MacNaughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1350년 스컷랜드에서 102세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish родился около 1250 г. в местности креигниш кастл, аргилл, Шотландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Christina MacNaughton в 1291 г. в местности креигниш кастл, аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1350 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 102 лет.
